/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -Wshadow -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/idf2vrml.dir/idf2vrml.cpp.o -o idf2vrml   -L/opt/kicad/program/V5/Tears_V5_S/build/lib_dxf  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/kicad/program/V5/Tears_V5_S/build/lib_dxf: libidf3.a ../../common/libcommon.a -lGL -lGLU -pthread -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0 ../../common/libgal.a ../../bitmaps_png/libbitmaps.a ../../polygon/libpolygon.a -lGLEW -lcairo -lpixman-1 -lGL -lGLU -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0
